tools.name: Scan Vault for Editorial Signals
tools.description: Inventories every allowlisted Markdown file and extracts bounded, source-linked editorial signals.

tools.name: Verify Editorial Opportunity Report
tools.description: Checks source links, score ranges, and required editorial fields.

tools.name: Collect Editorial Evidence
tools.description: Reads only the selected opportunity's allowlisted supporting files into a bounded evidence packet.

tools.name: Verify Operator Log Draft
tools.description: Checks Operator Log anatomy, evidence links, HTML metadata, and prose length.
